title: Case-To-Cure Master Completion Audit v0

sources.label: Multiple Myeloma ORP Frontier Roadmap v0

Multiple Myeloma Frontier Completion Audit Handoff v0

limitations: Does not inspect, process, extract, summarize, de-identify, publish, or authorize use of real case data, patient-identifying data, raw records, portal exports, molecular reports, pathology reports, flow reports, genomics reports, images, notes, exact dates tied to a person, clinician names, site names tied to a person, sponsor contacts, private paths, private prompts, private case IDs, or re-identification keys.
Does not copy private correspondence, unpublished expert comments, reviewer deliberation, private permission context, private reviewer identities, or private contact details.

Does not authorize single-case claims, public case reports, case-derived claims, generated biomedical claims, generated packet content, generated case summaries, generated publication text, patient-specific outputs, patient matching, trial matching, target actionability, source ranking, evidence ranking, target ranking, mechanism ranking, product ranking, therapy ranking, trial ranking, option ranking, recommendations, sequencing, comparison, prioritization, private-lab work, legal clearance, regulatory readiness, ethics readiness, security readiness, retention decisions, emergency handling, publication, release, or clinical decisions.
Does not complete expert-review-needed, private-lab-needed, clinical-team-needed, legal-needed, regulatory-needed, publication-gate-needed, or human-review-needed gates.
Does not select a new autonomous public-safe phase.
Does not claim that multiple myeloma has been cured or that a vaccine has been found.
